extDescription.message: A semi-automatic Gmail assistant that extracts email threads through printable view or on-page expansion, then helps you draft replies with ChatGPT.

popupIntro.message: Open a Gmail thread and click the “GPT Mail” button at the bottom right, or use the button below to open the panel.

popupStatusNeedGmail.message: Run this while a Gmail tab is open.

popupStatusFailed.message: Could not open the panel. Reload Gmail, then try again.

popupStep1.message: Open an email thread in Gmail

popupStep2.message: Load the thread and pass the prompt to ChatGPT

popupStep4.message: Insert it into Gmail and review the draft
